entries.title: Unlocking the PSP’s Dual Core setup.
entries.author: Acid_Snake
entries.summary:
Contrary to what Sony wanted everyone to believe, the PSP is not actually a single core setup, it is in fact a dual core setup, and PSP Guru m-cid is here to break it...
